adrs.title: Holo Forge
adrs.full: Holo Forge — a build is a verifiable, re-derivable κ-transform: the compiler is a content-addressed object and every compilation re-derives byte-for-byte with no server

adrs.title: Holo Q
adrs.full: Holo Q — inference is a verifiable, re-derivable κ-transform: a real model runs in the browser, the weights are a content-addressed κ-disk, and every answer re-derives byte-for-byte with no server
adrs.status: Accepted (app shipped; witness + gate row pending)

adrs.title: Holo Own
adrs.full: Holo Own — verifiable, self-sovereign ownership on the content-addressable substrate (the "Own" era, without the casino)

adrs.title: Holo Q · E₈
adrs.full: Holo Q · E₈ — every holospace-native LLM is compiled to a verifiable, deduplicated 2-bit κ-object against the ATLAS-declared E₈ quantization standard
adrs.status: Proposed — the design is pinned here *before* the engine surgery, so it is verifiable up front

adrs.title: Holo Build
adrs.full: Holo Build — the third native holospace pillar: a serverless, VS Code-faithful IDE where every object's code is content-addressed, edits re-render live, and humans + AI agents co-edit converging to one κ

adrs.title: Holo Lang

adrs.title: Holo Link

adrs.full: Holo Product — the canonical foundation that bundles and balances Holo UI ⊕ Holo UX

adrs.full: Holo Product Manager — the full-cycle PM framework (Pragmatic), wired to the substrate

adrs.title: QVAC SDK
adrs.full: QVAC SDK — Tether's local AI SDK, encoded native to Hologram OS (Builders)

adrs.title: Holo Settle · the Plasma rail
adrs.full: Holo Settle · the Plasma rail — verifiable settlement pays out in real, gasless USD₮, bound by content address to the proven work it pays for; the on-chain dollar Merkle-commits to the receipt, the entitlement stays post-quantum, and no key custody is minted

adrs.title: Holo Route
adrs.full: Holo Route — typed semantic streams: the routing plane. A pipeline is a content-addressed dataflow graph of deterministic κ-transforms whose seams are type-checked by re-derivation before a byte flows, sealed as one self-verifying κ any peer re-runs with no server

adrs.title: Holo Trade
adrs.full: Holo Trade — a self-sovereign trading terminal over Hyperliquid: read the order book with no server, sign every order with the user's own key through the default-deny wallet gate, delegate fast trading to a withdrawal-less agent wallet that is a revocable UCAN, and seal each fill as a post-quantum, content-addressed receipt that re-derives to the exact computation it settles. No new exchange code is written — the official Hyperliquid SDK does all signing and encoding; Hologram supplies only the identity, the conscience gate, and the proof.

adrs.title: Holo Bittensor
adrs.full: Holo Bittensor — the decentralized intelligence market as a content-addressed projection: every neuron is a self-verifying NANDA agent, every subnet a κ-rooted catalogue, every inference a re-derivable receipt, settled in TAO only against proven work

adrs.title: Holo Strategy
adrs.full: Holo Strategy — the trading-strategy lifecycle (author → backtest → deploy) as content-addressed objects, by vendoring QuantConnect LEAN verbatim (Apache-2.0) as a sealed engine κ. A strategy is a self-verifying UOR object; a LEAN backtest is a *re-derivable* κ-transform with a PROV-O receipt (LEAN's determinism IS Law L5 — the Sharpe re-derives or is refused, you never trust a server's number); live deployment routes every LEAN order through Holo Trade's default-deny wallet gate as a conscience-gated, revocable UCAN agent. Humans write QCAlgorithm in C#/Python; agents drive the identical lifecycle over MCP. No engine code is written — LEAN is the engine; Hologram supplies identity, content-addressing, conscience, and proof.

adrs.title: Holo Telemetry
adrs.full: Holo Telemetry — system-wide observability native to the UOR substrate. Adopt the OpenTelemetry data model and W3C Trace Context as content-addressed UOR objects (reject the Prometheus scraper): a span is a PROV-O Activity whose W3C ids are derived from the operation's content, so a signal's identity re-derives by holding only its κ; wall-clock numbers are honestly host-attested, never claimed as re-derived

adrs.title: Holo Forge
adrs.full: Holo Forge — verified execution: a computation is a re-derivable κ-transform, so "verified bytes" become "verified computation", trustlessly and 100% serverless in any browser

adrs.title: UOR-native Zig
adrs.full: UOR-native Zig — a deterministic Zig→WASM frontend for Holo Forge, so the substrate authors its own compute objects in a lean, zero-runtime systems language and a build stays a re-derivable κ-transform
adrs.status: Proposed — *not yet Accepted, by design*: the keystone property (Zig→WASM byte-determinism

adrs.title: Holo Heal
adrs.full: Holo Heal — the OS heals itself, autonomously, by content

adrs.title: Holo Suspend
adrs.full: Holo Suspend — dehydrate ↔ rehydrate a live run to a content-addressed checkpoint

adrs.title: Holo Theme System
adrs.full: Holo Theme System — a Chakra-derived token foundation so every holo-native app looks incredible by default

adrs.title: Holo Theme substrate
adrs.full: Holo Theme substrate — themes as κ-addressed, self-verifying objects, so the whole OS is dynamically customizable through one token source

adrs.title: Holo Cosmos
adrs.full: Holo Cosmos — real-time, navigable, infinitely-detailed environments streamed as κ-objects

adrs.title: Holo Mind
adrs.full: Holo Mind — agency becomes an OS-wide, ambient, self-evolving fabric: one verb surface every app and agent shares, one fail-closed conscience every action passes, and a self that learns by a re-derivable κ-transform so even how it grew is provable
adrs.status: Phase 0 landed + **promoted** (witnessed `#holo-mind`, required + shell-wired) · deeper fabric

adrs.title: Holo Prov
adrs.full: Holo Prov — provenance is a binding, in-tab-verifiable feature of every holospace: each app proves its own lineage by re-deriving every ancestor's closure, and the shell maintains the live, content-addressed provenance hypergraph
adrs.status: Accepted — LANDED in the running OS but **witness + conformance row pending** (the ADR-0052

adrs.title: Holo Q Diffusion
adrs.full: Holo Q Diffusion — a masked-diffusion LM is a SECOND decode family under the one inference transform: the receipt is decode-agnostic, so block-by-block denoising re-derives exactly as token-by-token greedy does
adrs.status: Accepted (seam landed + Node-witnessed; WebGPU forward kernel + `#holo-q-diffusion` row + κ-re-lock pending)

adrs.title: Holo Q Mixture-of-Specialists
adrs.full: Holo Q Mixture-of-Specialists — the helper tasks stop defaulting to one big model and each auto-discovers the BEST small specialist the open web offers, run on-device and proven by receipt: "auto" stops meaning "use the main model" and starts meaning "the right tiny mind for this exact job"
adrs.status: Accepted (selection + routing landed + Node-witnessed + validated against the live Hugging Face Hub; the FIRST execution adapter — Session search / embeddings — landed + proven end-to-end; remaining provider adapters + shell wiring + `#holo-q-mux` row pending)

adrs.title: Holo Q Fabric
adrs.full: Holo Q Fabric — content-addressed compute for the specialist fleet: every model call is κ-memoized (O(1) replay), streamed, and κ-addressed for render reuse — the layer that converges a universe of small models toward a real-time, LLM-like rendered experience
adrs.status: Accepted (fabric + the explicit Holo Mind orchestrator binding + the κ-addressed renderer landed + Node-witnessed — 11/11 fabric, 12/12 end-to-end, 8/8 renderer — and shown LIVE in a creator-mode demo; the persisted index + real model planning pending)

adrs.title: Holo Perception
adrs.full: Holo Perception — the orchestrator SEES the whole holospace by READING the κ-graph it already produces, not by screenshotting pixels: every object carries a code-κ and a visual-κ, and the drift between them is the real-time self-improvement signal
adrs.status: Accepted (perception layer landed + Node-witnessed 12/12 + verified LIVE in the browser; full-coverage producer wiring + the raster-edge vision specialist pending)

adrs.title: Holo Trinity
adrs.full: Holo Trinity — the unified, OS-wide create·exist·perceive experience: one loop every native app inherits by conforming, behind one mount and one verb, with the trinity invisible
adrs.status: Accepted (composition root + the SHELL-WIDE INSTALL landed + Node-witnessed 9/9 + verified LIVE in the real shell; full app conformance pending)

adrs.title: Holo Home
adrs.full: Holo Home — the desktop becomes a content-addressed holospace: every holospace (now including the home itself) is ONE κ-object, and render · link · remix · share · provenance follow from that single fact
adrs.status: Accepted (the scene-manifest model landed + Node-witnessed 11/11; the compositor refactor + Create wiring staged)

adrs.title: Holo Scene
adrs.full: Holo Scene — the general composed-holospace manifest: any κ-app or experience that arranges κ-objects is ONE κ with render · link · remix · share · provenance over its LIVE STATE, not just its source; the desktop (ADR-0088) is its first specialization
adrs.status: Accepted (the general engine landed + Node-witnessed 10/10; `holo-home-scene` refactored onto it)

adrs.title: Holo Q Remote Model
adrs.full: Holo Q Remote Model — a non-local LLM is reached through ONE governed, witnessed substrate operation, not app-level fetch: the engine is a content address (never a URL), every answer mints a re-derivable receipt, and the conscience gates the egress
adrs.status: Proposed (the egress seam, the boost subsumption, the cross-frame postMessage protocol, AND the live `shell

adrs.title: Q
adrs.full: Q — the one unified surface for hologram-native intelligence: a single door every human, app, and external agent touches, composing the whole Holo Q spine behind one verb
adrs.status: Accepted (the unified surface landed + Node-witnessed 17/17 + verified live in the booted shell)

adrs.title: Holo Import
adrs.full: Holo Import — paste a GitHub URL, get a running, content-addressed Holo app: import is a DETERMINISTIC ENCODER onto the existing publishSource/Q spine, not a new runtime, and it is HONEST about the line where "serverless" ends
adrs.status: Proposed (the pure core + the static/SPA loop landed + Node-witnessed 32/32, AND wired into the live Create studio + verified live in the booted shell; the Forge bundler class and the `#holo-import` row are staged)

adrs.title: Holo Import → agent-native
adrs.full: Holo Import → agent-native — the moment a GitHub repo imports (ADR-0092) it is auto-WIRED into the MCP + /~<app>/api REST seams every holospace ALREADY exposes, so any AI agent or holo app can fetch · re-derive (L5) · run · share · discover it with zero author effort; Railway's "connect a repo → it runs" feel, zero servers, agent-native by default
adrs.status: Proposed (agent-surface derivation + baseline loop + LIVE in-page auto-registration + DECLARED-surface tier + SERVERLESS TRANSPORT BRIDGE (external HTTP agent reaches an import via the SW) + FORGE BUNDLER CLASS (client-bundle repo → one self-contained app via a real esbuild κ-transform) + VENDORED κ-pinned esbuild toolchain (local-first, no CDN) + GOVERNED INGEST (conscience-gated, Law L4) all landed + Node-witnessed 45/45 agent · 38/38 import · 12/12 forge · 6/6 vendor against the REAL cores/esbuild/conscience, AND verified live in the booted shell with real repos, real esbuild-wasm (vendored + CDN), and the PII gate; OpenAPI-YAML + postMessage + governed-egress execution + non-esbuild build-plugin repos staged)

adrs.title: Holo Hub
adrs.full: Holo Hub — a Shopify-class commerce experience for the universe of κ-addressed holo apps, **100% serverless and κ-anchored, fast in any browser**, where a PRODUCT IS a holo app addressed by its `did:holo` κ; built by COMPOSING the substrate's already-shipped commerce primitives (Own · Settle · Atlas · Scene) and **ADOPTING Medusa's commerce MODEL as a byte-pinned spec** — the "adopt the desktop, don't run it" pattern ([0029](0029-adopt-the-desktop.md)) — NOT running Medusa's server, because the substrate is server-less by law and Medusa's "serverless" means serverless-**Node**, not in-browser
